description: Participants identify species (birds, amphibians, mammals, and insects) from audio recordings collected in Colombia's Middle Magdalena Valley. The task requires predicting multiple possible species per clip, making it a multi-label classification problem. Success is evaluated using the Birdclef ROC AUC metric on a held-out test set. Top solutions leverage pseudo-labeling and self-distillation to address class imbalance and acoustic variability.
